mapper.select: SELECT permission FROM role_permissions WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT r.role AS role, r.role_label AS role_label, rp.permission AS permission FROM roles r LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.role = rp.role ORDER BY r.role ASC, rp.id ASC
SELECT role_label FROM roles WHERE role = #{role} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO role_permissions (role, role_label, permission) VALUES
(#{role}, #{roleLabel}, #{permission})
